name: Pennsylvania Dutch Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the salt and egg whites with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
2. In a blender, blend all remaining ingredients until smooth and creamy.
3. Pour the cheese mixture into the egg whites. Gently fold together thoroughly.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch nonstick square or round cake pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40-50 minutes, until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Chill thoroughly. The cake will sink in the center as it cools, making a well for fruit.
7. Fill with berries or sliced unsweetened peaches to serve. Per serving: Calories--69.1, Carbohydrate--2.0 grams, Fat--2.3 grams.
